name: SaaSMetrics
headline: SaaS pricing & MRR/churn/LTV calculator
subheadline: Clarity on pricing & growth math. Built for saas founders, pmms.

cta.label: Use the free tool
cta.note: Free. No signup. Runs entirely in your browser.

seoDescription: SaaS pricing & MRR/churn/LTV calculator. Built for saas founders, pmms. Free to use.

faq.a: SaaS founders, PMMs. If that's you and "pricing & metrics confusion" sounds familiar, this was built for your exact situation.

faq.q: Why would I pay for this?
How fast do I get it?
faq.a: Right now — everything on this page works immediately, free.
No. The tool runs 100% in your browser — nothing you type or upload ever leaves your device. You can verify in DevTools: zero network calls during use.

validationMetric: Reach 200+ organic/community visits; target 30+ tool completions & 3+ CTA clicks in 14 days
deploymentTarget: Vercel (static) — primary; Cloudflare Pages / Netlify alternates
killCriteria: <50 visits AND <1 CTA click after 14 days of posting + indexing
biggestRisk: SEO is slow & commoditised; thin monetisation per visit unless niche has buyer intent
first10: Rank for 1 long-tail query; answer 5 relevant Reddit/Quora threads with the tool; 1 Product Hunt post
